name: ai-sdk
description:
Vercel AI SDK (the SDK is FREE and OSS — MIT — even though Vercel hosts a separate paid AI Gateway). Multi-provider: swap between OpenAI / Anthropic / OpenRouter / Ollama / Google by changing one line.

Default provider: OpenRouter (single API key gives access to hundreds of models including FREE ones — Llama 3.1, Mistral 7B, Gemma, etc.). Easy migration: change the import + env var.

For truly free local dev: install Ollama (https://ollama.com), pull a model (`ollama pull llama3.2`), and uncomment the ollama block in src/lib/ai.ts. No API key, no rate limits, runs on your machine.
post_install_steps: • Ollama (local, free): install from https://ollama.com → set OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434
Test the example route: curl -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/chat -d '{"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}'
